node.statement: CONFIG-001: For any finite label type alpha and length n, ordered configurations are functions Fin n -> alpha. Given a distinguished vacuum label, particleNumber counts sites not equal to the vacuum and is bounded by n; the constant vacuum configuration has particle number 0, a constant non-vacuum configuration has particle number n, and the number of configurations is |alpha|^n. Specialising to Fibonacci labels gives exactly 2^n configurations, all-vacuum particle number 0, and all-tau particle number n. Lean proves these finite combinatorial facts in Formalisation/Foundations/Configurations.lean; Julia and WolframScript check Fibonacci counts and binomial particle sectors for n <= 8. This node does not prove the categorical Hom-space direct-sum expansion or Hilbert-space semantics.
